properties.name: Riyadh National Zoo
properties.description: Visit Riyadh Zoo, Saudi Arabia’s largest and oldest, home to 1,300 animals from 190 species, offering train rides and performances.

properties.name: Via Riyadh
properties.description: VIA Riyadh offers luxury with the St. Regis hotel, designer stores, top restaurants, and the exclusive Renaissance cinema experience.

properties.name: Murabba Palace
properties.description: Al Murabba Historical Palace in Riyadh is a symbol of the city’s rich history, preserving memories of key historical events.

properties.name: Addoho Neighborhood
properties.description: Addoho Neighborhood is the last old neighborhood preserving its traditional Najdi architecture, but with modern amenities.

properties.name: Wadi Namar Waterfall
properties.description: Wadi Namar Waterfall and Dam Park in Riyadh is a beautiful green area with lovely views, picnic sites, and fun activities.

properties.name: Al Masmak Palace Museum
properties.description: Al Masmak Fortress, built during Imam Abdullah's reign, is a historic monument celebrating the unification of Saudi Arabia.

properties.name: National Museum Of Saudi Arabia
properties.description: Explore Saudi Arabia’s history at the National Museum, featuring over 3,700 artifacts of Islamic heritage across 17,000 square meters.
properties.reference_link: National Museum Of Saudi Arabia Instagram

properties.name: Jax District
properties.description: This trendy Diriyah neighborhood offers street art, galleries, and creative studios, hosting festivals like MDLBEAST and Noor Riyadh.

properties.name: At-Turaif World Heritage Site
properties.description: The UNESCO World Heritage At-Turaif Site features mud-brick palaces, mosques, museums, and Najdi architecture.
properties.reference_link: At-Turaif World Heritage Site - Diriyah Website

properties.name: Diriyah History Museum
properties.description: Visit Diriyah Museum to explore an 18th-century palace, showcasing the history of the region, the House of Saud, and Najdi architecture.

properties.name: Bujairi Terrace
properties.description: Bujairi Terrace in Diriyah offers over 20 world-class dining options, cultural events, and views of UNESCO World Heritage site At-Turaif.

properties.name: KAFD
properties.description: King Abdullah Financial District (KAFD) boasts modern architecture, green spaces, and advanced urban infrastructure.

properties.name: Naila Art Gallery
properties.description: Naila Gallery, founded in 2012 by Mrs. Naifa AlFayez, is Riyadh's leading art venue, hosting artworks from over 400 artists.

properties.name: Al Ajlan Art Gallery
properties.description: Al Ajlan Gallery, founded by Mohammed Al Ajlan in 2018, exhibits his unique art blending Islamic heritage, poetry, and symbolism.

properties.name: Abstract Art Gallery
properties.description: The Abstract Art Gallery showcases local art pioneers and celebrates cultural and popular legacies.

properties.name: King Khaled Royal Reserve (Urmah)
properties.description: The King Khaled Royal Reserve is an 11,300-square-km wildlife sanctuary, home to endangered species and diverse ecosystems.
properties.reference_link: King Khaled Royal Reserve - IARDA Website

properties.name: The Zone
properties.description: The Zone is a luxury outdoor lifestyle complex with upscale retail, exquisite dining, and vibrant city life.

properties.name: Boulevard City
properties.description: Boulevard City offers shopping, dining, and entertainment year-round, with activities like go-kart racing, skiing, and performances.

properties.name: King Fahad National Library
properties.description: The King Fahad National Library was created as a tribute to King Salman, evolving from a public to a national library with citizen support.

properties.name: Laysen Valley
properties.description: Laysen Valley, part of Saudi Arabia's Vision 2030, aims to enhance quality of life, trade, and economic growth in Riyadh.

properties.name: Roshn Front
properties.description: Roshn Front is a stylish mall features a water fountain, shops, fine dining and an outdoor movie theater.

properties.name: King Abdulaziz Equestrian Field
properties.description: King Abdulaziz Equestrian Field is a great place for horse racing fans, featuring beautiful Arabian horses and exciting events for all ages.

properties.name: Imam Turki Bin Abdullah Grand Mosque
properties.description: Imam Turki Bin Abdullah Grand Mosque is a historic site with peaceful prayer spaces and beautiful traditional Islamic architecture in Riyadh’s center.
properties.reference_link: Imam Turki bin Abdullah Grand Mosque - RCRC Website

properties.name: KAFD Grand Mosque
properties.description: The KAFD Grand Mosque, inspired by the desert rose, features a triangular design blending modern and Islamic architecture for a unique experience.

properties.name: KAPSARC Mosque
properties.description: The KAPSARC Mosque combines modern design with Islamic traditions, offering a calm and inspiring space for prayer and reflection in Riyadh.

properties.name: Saqr Al-Jazira Aviation Museum
properties.description: Saqr Al-Jazira Aviation Museum showcases Saudi Arabia's aviation history with iconic planes and exhibits, perfect for aviation fans and families alike.
properties.reference_link: Saqer Al-Jazirah Royal Air Force Museum - MOD Website

properties.name: King Abdullah Park
properties.description: King Abdullah Park is a beautiful green space with walking paths, fountains, and lakes, ideal for family outings and relaxation.

properties.name: Dirab Park
properties.description: Dirab Park features Saudi Arabia’s first FIA-approved drag strip and scenic landscapes, ideal for motorsport fans and nature lovers.

properties.name: Al Samhaniya
properties.description: Explore Diriyah’s renovated streets with traditional homes, murals, cafes, and boutiques, including Bonjour Saudi’s design house, for unique finds.

properties.name: Central Library of Princess Nourah
properties.description: The Central Library at Princess Noura University is a modern, spacious study and learning hub under a futuristic glass dome.

properties.name: Attache
properties.description: MDLBEAST's new venue is a converted stable-turned-nightclub with a unique theme and an attached restaurant.

properties.name: Museum of Bygone Years
properties.description: Visit the museum that showcases Saudi Arabia’s cultural evolution through exhibits highlighting its rich history, traditions, and heritage.

properties.name: Al-Hamdan Heritage Museum
properties.description: Al Hamdan Heritage Museum takes you through Riyadh’s history with traditional artifacts reflecting the region’s traditions and cultural lifestyle.

properties.name: Al-Subaie Palace
properties.description: Al-Subaie Heritage House, located in Shaqra, is a historic museum showcasing traditional Najdi architecture and offering insights into the region's history.

properties.name: Al Safat Square (Justice Square)
properties.description: The square contains a big open market area and a few surrounding coffee shops. Many national celebrations are held in this square.

properties.name: Kingdom Center Sky Bridge
properties.description: Kingdom Center Sky Bridge is a 300m-high observation deck in Riyadh, offering panoramic city views. Accessible via a high-speed elevator, it's a top tourist attraction open daily.

properties.name: Al Nassr Football Club
properties.description: Al Nassr Football Club is a legendary Saudi team with a rich history, passionate fan base, and thrilling matches that fans can enjoy.

properties.name: Diriyah Art Futures
properties.description: DAF is the first-ever new media art gallery in the region and is known for celebrating modern art in traditional settings. It is also a learning hub for those interested in new media
